summary: Backend testing for iteration 24 - All 14 tests passed (100%). Tested Masterclass endpoints (genera alias, generate-script), Partners Unified View (ObjectId fix), Admin Email Templates (CRUD + preview), and YouTube OAuth status.
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering fix verified: GET /masterclass/genera is correctly placed BEFORE GET /masterclass/{partner_id} to avoid FastAPI route conflict
serialize_doc() in mongodb_views.py correctly removes ObjectId from nested documents
EmailTemplateManager uses caching (5 min TTL) for performance
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing partner ID 23 (Daniele Andolfi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints from iteration 24 are working correctly. YouTube OAuth is authenticated (youtube_authenticated=true). Email templates system supports 3 default templates: partnership_welcome, analisi_welcome, analisi_reminder_48h. Partners unified view returns data without ObjectId serialization errors.

admin_email_templates.GET /api/admin/email-templates/partnersh: ✅ Returns template with subject, body_html, variables

mocked_apis.note: All endpoints use real database and LLM integration
